[{"key":"0.27463270207325056","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1155/h_581/50364/103682/2024/9/24/622965.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_961/h_752/50364/103682/2024/9/24/516952.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.37b6bed37cbd7","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"彼安汀"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者彼安汀，身份编码A01-111501，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"E.O.S.熔断警备署的副署长。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"外表高贵，举止优雅，与人相处时总是一副笑吟吟，云淡风轻的样子，颇具亲和力。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"工作时雷厉风行，行事滴水不漏，很注重自己的沟通方式，也很擅长倾听。处事冷静、遇事时总是胸有成竹的模样，仿佛一切都在她的计划之中。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"只要她愿意出手，就一定会得到「结果」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"实际上是个杀伐果决且冷酷无情的狠角色，不会因个人情感而影响判断力，为达目的可以不择一切手段。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"与她相处时需要时刻保持警惕。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{" :"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【洞察。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你成功了，这超出了我的预料。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"康坦士转过身，看着正坐在沙发上喝茶的少女。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她一如既往地气定神闲，云淡风轻。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这离不开校长你的配合，仅凭我的能力，远远达不到这样的效果。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「计划的实施，也不会这么顺利。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「熔断警备署是个很好的舞台。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不得不承认，在我所有的学生当中，你的确是独一无二的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我很高兴，能得到校长你如此高的赞誉。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「所以，你已经准备好了？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你想怎么做？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「在人类自己的神话历史当中，从邪神洛基发起的诸神黄昏开始，再到诸神黄昏的结束，才正式宣告诸神时代的终结，人类时代的到来。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「时代的结束，需要交给这个时代的建立者亲自完成，而新规则的重建，需要在旧世界的尸骸里完成。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「否则，一切的改变将会毫无意义，陷入毫无意义的螺旋。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"彼安汀站在了落地窗前，看向了远处。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那……你的那位英雄呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「他（她）……已经出现了。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【凝望。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这一局……····我认输了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"彼安汀微笑着看着眼前的人，然后云淡风轻地认了输。但眼前的人并不像是彼安汀一样云淡风轻，显然，这场对局，给了他极大的压力。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而当彼安汀放下棋子投降认输的那一刻，他才从那股巨大的压力当中走出来，如释重负般地松了口气。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「愿赌服输，你要的东西，我会给你准备好。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"彼安汀笑着看着眼前的男人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那我就等你的好消息了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"男人看了彼安汀一眼，然后一脸满足地起身。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"彼安汀始终保持着笑容，然后目送着他离开。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「看起来事情很顺利。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"莉拉姆坐在一边的沙发上啃着苹果，一边看着彼安汀。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"旁边的侍者为彼安汀送来了一杯红茶，然后又转身离开。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不过，我还是觉得很麻烦。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她站了起来，伸了个懒腰。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你是说这种方式吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对啊，你只要让我去一趟，肯定就什么事就没有了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「而且，你要什么，我都可以帮你带回来。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「暴力并不能解决一切，莉拉姆。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你要记住这句话哦。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"彼安汀并没有理会莉拉姆，而是自顾自地喝了一口红茶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对棋手而言，真正的棋局从不在眼前的棋盘上，而是在棋盘之外。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「就算你把桌子掀翻了，把棋盘砸碎了，已经开始的棋局造就已经开始了，不会有任何影响。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"彼安汀看着眼前的棋盘。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「示弱，有时候是为了得到更多的东西。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她拿起自己的白色棋子，放在了黑色国王的一侧。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——将军。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【审视。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「校长您对彼安汀，倒是格外地关注。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在十三区高校的校长办公室，伦芙纳一边呷着手中的红茶，一边调侃着眼前的康坦士。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"康坦士这才放下手中的报告。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"报告的标题很醒目，经过最高安全防务署署长伦芙纳的任命，彼安汀成为了熔断警备署的代署长。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"至于原因，是为了表彰彼安汀在西弗里七日暴，Dong，时的功绩，在关键时刻，彼安汀果断启动了灵魂杀手，结束了西弗里最后的暴乱。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「因为我欠她一个人情，至今也还没有机会偿还。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对我有过恩惠的人，我总是能很清楚地记得他们的名字。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"康坦士并没有正面回应。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对我也一样吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伦芙纳笑着看着眼前的男人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「作为安全防务署的署长，这样得力的下属，你不喜欢吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我喜欢有野心的人，她们总是很好驱使。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不过……我更看好能把野心藏起来的人，她们能走得更远。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「也许你会看走眼。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"康坦士看着眼前的伦芙纳，露出意味深长的笑容。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「或许有一天，她会成为你的对手。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那我就拭目以待了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伦芙纳放下茶杯，与康坦士对视了一眼。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而那双灰褐色的瞳孔里，流露出的不是蔑视，而是兴奋。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.f7b6c4dbaab4c","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拉条，增伤，复活"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 141|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性生命/防御加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"高额的暴击增伤在速刷副本中有着不错的表现，主应用在兵祸，多琪，奥洛拉这三个副本。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.456cb5df82e5e8","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12浴血+12疾驰"}]}]}},{"key":"0.33cc778705025","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胡狼/千兆字节"}]}]}},{"key":"0.681c38deba5b58","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":"","content":""}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_551/h_445/50364/842288/2025/7/18/1356.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
